units.source_text: 2 ⾃過渡⾄IFRS 17起，集團就最早⾃2018年起的新承保業務應⽤全⾯追溯計算法。倘應⽤全⾯追溯計算法並不切實可⾏，集團會主要應⽤公允值計算法。
units.translation_target_text: 2 Since the transition to IFRS 17, the Group has applied a full retrospective calculation for new underwriting business starting in 2018 at the earliest. If it is not practicable to apply a full retrospective calculation, the Group will primarily apply the fair value calculation.
units.translation_en: 2 Since the transition to IFRS 17, the Group has applied a full retrospective calculation for new underwriting business starting in 2018 at the earliest. If it is not practicable to apply a full retrospective calculation, the Group will primarily apply the fair value calculation.

layout_variants.display_en: 2 Since the transition to IFRS 17, the Group has applied a full retrospective calculation for new underwriting business starting in 2018 at the earliest. If it is not practicable to apply a full retrospective calculation, the Group will primarily apply the fair value calculation.

units.source_text: 3 「其他合約」指⾃簽訂合約起開始應⽤IFRS 17計量的合約，包括於過渡時應⽤全⾯追溯計算法計量以及過渡後簽訂的合約。
units.translation_target_text: 3 "Other contracts" refers to contracts that are measured using IFRS 17 from the time the contract is signed, including contracts that are measured using the full retrospective calculation method at the time of transition and contracts signed after the transition.
